ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the model */,
  "model_short_name" TEXT /* Short name or alias for the model */,
  "model_package" TEXT /* Package or library the model belongs to */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the model */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the model was added to the platform */,
  "earliest_forecast_date" TEXT /* Earliest date a forecast was made using the model */,
  "earliest_ensemble_submission_date" TEXT /* Earliest date an ensemble submission was made using the model */,
  "last_forecast_date" TEXT /* Last date a forecast was made using the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., SIR, SEIR) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_url" TEXT /* URL of the model's repository or documentation */,
  "model_license" TEXT /* License under which the model is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_package FOREIGN KEY ("model_package") REFERENCES model_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "package_url" TEXT /* URL of the package's repository or documentation */,
  "package_license" TEXT /* License under which the package is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used for the forecast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "forecast_horizon" INTEGER /* Forecast horizon (e.g., number of days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ensemble_submissions" (
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ensemble submission */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the ensemble */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the ensemble submission was made */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used for the ensemble */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the ensemble submission */,
  "ensemble_type" TEXT /* Type of ensemble (e.g., bagging, boosting) */,
  "ensemble_size" INTEGER /* Number of models in the ensemble */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ensemble_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ensemble_submissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "parameter_range" TEXT /* Range of the parameter (e.g., min, max) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug, feature request) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the model (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the revision */,
  "revision_type" TEXT /* Type of revision (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "revision_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the revision (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_revisions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., manual, tutorial) */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_documents_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the model */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was used */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of using the model */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., research, testing) */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of usage (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-authorship, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
